hooks.command: bash -c 'file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *"tournament.jsx"* ]] && echo "DOCS REMINDER: tournament.jsx was modified. Review 2026-mrd-world-cup-tracker/docs/ and update any pages that describe changed behaviour (ranking logic, bracket structure, app features, schedule)."'
